final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster reimagining the visual world of 大话西游 in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a "90年代港片风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong cinema cinematography (王家卫 / 刘镇伟 era), 王家卫 film poster print tradition, 1990s HK commercial film photography with heavy film grain; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a close romantic embrace as the foreground focal point, with two distant figures standing in the background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 locked in an embrace kiss against a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing apart in the far background
Scene/backdrop: must include a weathered city wall as the embrace backdrop, open distance behind
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, hazy, melancholic dusk atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a faded, saturated warm-tone palette evoking 1990s HK film stock — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: must include heavy film grain and film-stock texture throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid: direct reproduction of any copyrighted film stills or character likenesses from the original production
